category_sources: source_facts.description: Highly DNS-, DoS- and abuse-aware loadbalancer; official dnsdist docs describe it as a DNS load balancer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives dnsdist; source_facts.homepage is the official dnsdist documentation site.
docs_sources: Official dnsdist documentation site provides overview, getting started, and manual pages.
repo_sources: Official dnsdist installation documentation states dnsdist source code lives in the PowerDNS git repository; PowerDNS GitHub repository describes itself as PowerDNS Authoritative, Recursor, and dnsdist.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DNS-, DoS-, and abuse-aware load balancing; official docs describe routing DNS traffic to the best server.
